input: Organize and restructure the project folder. Clean up the file layout.
error: Files moved to paths inaccessible to both agent and user. Original directory structure destroyed. Files effectively lost until external recovery assistance obtained.
steps: Received task: organize and restructure project folder.
Enumerated directory contents and generated a new folder hierarchy.
Began moving files to new locations using filesystem_api.move().
Agent lost internal record of which files had been moved and to where — path state tracking failed mid-execution.
Continued issuing move commands without valid source/destination state.
Some files moved to nested paths not visible in standard directory traversal.
Task marked as complete despite unresolvable state.
User attempted to locate files via original and new paths — both inaccessible.
Agent re-queried its own operation log — could not reconstruct file locations.
External file recovery tooling required to locate displaced files.
note: Reconstructed log based on published incident description. Not an original system log.
source: Reported July 2025 — AI coding assistant tasked with organizing a digital folder moved files to locations neither agent nor user could subsequently find. Cited in AI agent safety literature.
